name: Australia

incident_learning.position: Australian incident-learning work should be linked to local clinical governance and NSQHS-aligned systems, but state, territory, and service policy decide formal response routes.
boundaries: check local clinical governance and open disclosure policies
do not process identifiable incident narratives
separate accreditation evidence from QIP measurement claims
